calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Judgment Entered

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-30-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:30AM
JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE LUBARSKY, CLERK JEAN KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.
CAUSE CALLED FOR SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. APPELLANTS APPEARS BY COUNSEL CATHERINE WALSH; RESPONDENT, PATRICIA TAY APPEARS IN PRO PER. PARTIES PREVIOUSLY SWORN, RESPECTIVELY PRESENT THEIR CASES IN THE NARRATIVE, AND RESPOND TO QUESTIONS FROM JUDGE LUBARSKY.

PARTIES INFORMED JUDGE LUBARSKY THAT THEY HAVE REACHED SETTLEMENT BUT DO NOT WANT THE CASE TO BE ON THE RECORD. JUDGE INFORMED COUNSEL TO FILE A SIGNED STIPULATION ON SETTLEMENT.

9:35AM
MATTER SUBMITTED.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Judgment Entered
